title: Water Crews Working To Repair Water Main Break On West Fayette Street
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main break at South Clinton and West Fayette Street. Service disruption affects the 200 block of West Fayette Street with expected restoration by 6 pm; the intersection remains closed to vehicle traffic with sidewalks open and detours in place.
